items.desc_zh: 沃什可以引导其在日常市场中发挥较小的作用，同时就如何以及何时进行干预制定更明确的规则。

items.title_en: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争加剧通胀担忧，五月消费者信心创历史新低
items.desc_en: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.
items.desc_zh: 由于美伊战争和油价上涨，人们对价格上涨的担忧加剧，5 月份消费者信心跌至历史新低。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: Turkey opposition vows to resist court ruling ousting leader as political crisis deepens - NBC News
items.title_zh: 随着政治危机加深，土耳其反对派誓言抵制法院罢免领导人的裁决 - NBC新闻
items.desc_en: Turkey opposition vows to resist court ruling ousting leader as political crisis deepens  NBC NewsTurkish police detain 13 in probe of opposition congress that chose ousted leader  ReutersTurkish cour
items.desc_zh: 随着政治危机加深，土耳其反对派誓言抵制法院驱逐领导人的裁决 NBC 新闻土耳其警方拘留了 13 人，以调查选择被驱逐领导人的反对派国会 路透社土耳其法院

items.title_en: Dow jumps 400 points to record as Wall Street heads for winning week, Treasury yields ease: Live updates
items.title_zh: 随着华尔街走向胜利周，道琼斯指数跃升 400 点，创历史新高，国债收益率缓和：实时更新
items.desc_en: Volatility picked up this week in the stock and bond markets.
items.desc_zh: 本周股票和债券市场的波动性加剧。

items.title_en: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国埃博拉风险升至“非常高”
items.desc_en: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.
items.desc_zh: 联合国卫生机构负责人表示，更广泛地区的风险“高”，但在全球范围内仍然“低”。

items.title_en: Trump defends DOJ fund after Senate Republicans push back
items.title_zh: 在参议院共和党人反对后，特朗普捍卫司法部基金
items.desc_en: President Trump droppped his $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for the DOJ creating a $1.8 billion fund to compensate alleged "lawfare" victims.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统放弃了针对国税局 100 亿美元的诉讼，以换取司法部设立 18 亿美元的基金来赔偿所谓的“法律”受害者。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.title_en: Donald Trump Jr.-backed 'Steroid Olympics' are happening on Sunday. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 小唐纳德·特朗普支持的“类固醇奥运会”将于周日举行。这是值得期待的
items.desc_en: Olympic medallists are among 42 athletes competing in the controversial competition, but the Enhanced Games has big product plans beyond the event this weekend.
items.desc_zh: 42 名运动员参加了这项备受争议的比赛，其中包括奥运会奖牌得主，但增强型运动会在本周末的赛事之外还有大型产品计划。

items.desc_en: The announcement comes a week after the Pentagon cancelled a planned deployment of 4,000 troops to the country.
items.desc_zh: 一周前，五角大楼取消了向该国部署 4000 名士兵的计划。

items.title_en: Love factually: Dating start-ups promise to cut the cheats
items.title_zh: 爱如实：约会初创公司承诺减少作弊行为
items.desc_en: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.
items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.title_en: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
items.title_zh: SpaceX 申请 IPO 可能使埃隆·马斯克成为万亿富翁
items.desc_en: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。
